data.title: Microservices
data.description: Google uses a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and isolate services for better management.
data.technical_spec: Services are independently deployable and scalable, communicating via well-defined APIs.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Advanced load balancing to manage traffic efficiently across data centers.
data.technical_spec: Global load balancing techniques with Anycast routing and Maglev components.

data.title: Distributed Systems
data.description: Highly distributed system architecture to ensure availability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Capable of handling vast data with Bigtable, Spanner, and Colossus.

data.title: Data Replication
data.description: Ensures data is replicated across multiple geographical locations.
data.technical_spec: Cross-region replication with Paxos algorithms for consistency.

data.title: Containerization
data.description: Utilization of containers for deploying applications efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Kubernetes orchestrated environments for isolation and resource management.
